headline: DoorDash (DASH) Down 9.6% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
summary: DoorDash (DASH) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: DoorDash vs. Shopify: Which E-Commerce Stock Has an Edge Now?
summary: DASH benefits from strong order growth and expanding partnerships, but rising competition may cap upside as SHOP gains momentum with AI and enterprise wins.

headline: Your Kids Still Raid the Pantry. They Just Do It Digitally Now—and You May Not Realize How Much They’re Spending
summary: Children are more commercially fluent than ever and may influence household spending in ways adults don't notice.
